sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt64, hash_value UInt64);
INSERT INTO test_hash (id, hash_value) VALUES (1, intHash64(100));
INSERT INTO test_hash (id, hash_value) VALUES (2, intHash64(-200));
UPDATE test_hash SET hash_value = intHash64(id * 10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hash_value FROM test_hash WHERE hash_value = intHash64(777);
